Reviews Contact

About South Seattle Handyman

12+ years serving Seattle and surrounding areas

South Seattle Handyman started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable handyman services to our neighbors. We're not just contractors; we're Seattle homeowners ourselves, familiar with the unique challenges our climate and housing stock present.

We believe in clear communication, upfront pricing, and quality workmanship. Our team is comprised of skilled professionals who take pride in their work and treat your home with the respect it deserves. We show up on time, prepared, and ready to tackle any task, big or small.

We're deeply invested in the Seattle community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. When you choose South Seattle Handyman, you're supporting a local business that cares about the Emerald City.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
South Seattle Handyman

Trusted handyman service professionals serving Seattle, WA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
